debug_info.goal:
G : Type u_1
inst✝² : AddCommGroup G
inst✝¹ : Fintype G
inst✝ : Module (ZMod 2) G
x : G
hx : x ≠ 0
⊢ Nat.card ↑{φ | φ x = 1} = Nat.card G / 2

proof:
obtain ⟨ψ, hψ⟩ : ∃ ψ : G →+ ZMod 2, ψ x = 1 := by
    let B := Basis.ofVectorSpace (ZMod 2) G
    obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ : ∃ i, B.repr x i ≠ 0 := by
      contrapose! hx; exact B.repr.injective (B.repr.map_zero.symm ▸ funext hx)
    exact ⟨(B.coord i).toAddMonoidHom, (ZMod.ne_zero_iff_one _).mp hi⟩
  have h1 : Nat.card { φ : G →+ ZMod 2 | φ x = 0 } = Nat.card { φ : G →+ ZMod 2 | φ x = 1 } := by
    apply Nat.card_congr
    exact { toFun := fun φ ↦ ⟨φ.1 + ψ, by simp [AddMonoidHom.add_apply, φ.2, hψ]⟩,
            invFun := fun φ ↦ ⟨φ.1 + ψ, by simp [AddMonoidHom.add_apply, φ.2, hψ]⟩,
            left_inv := fun φ ↦ by ext; simp,
            right_inv := fun φ ↦ by ext; simp }
  have h2 : Nat.card (G →+ ZMod 2) = 2 * Nat.card { φ | φ x = 1 } := by
    rw [← Nat.card_sum, Nat.card_congr (Equiv.Set.sumCompl { φ | φ x = 1 }).symm, Nat.card_sum, h1, ← two_mul]
    congr; ext φ; simp; cases' φ x using ZMod.induction_on <;> rfl
  rw [card_of_dual] at h2
  exact (Nat.mul_div_cancel_left _ (by norm_num)).symm.trans (congrArg (· / 2) h2)
